description_long: This helmet features a sleek, angular design with a predominantly matte white surface accented by two vertical orange stripes running down the center of the front. The face area is defined by two large, stylized eye-like shapes outlined in dark gray, giving it a robotic or futuristic appearance. The lower portion and sides of the helmet are finished in a solid black, providing a strong contrast to the lighter upper section. The helmet appears to be constructed from a hard, durable material, likely a composite or reinforced plastic, with visible seams and panel lines suggesting a multi-part assembly. There are no visible ventilation openings, visors, or external attachments, and the rear is smooth and unadorned. The overall form is compact and contoured, designed to fit closely around the head for protection.
description: A futuristic, angular helmet with a matte white top, black lower section, and orange center stripes, featuring stylized eye-like details on the front.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's white faceplate with two orange stripes, prominent eye-like shapes, and a black lower jaw section.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the smooth, contoured shape, the transition from white to black, and the angular eye detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid black back of the helmet, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the same contoured design and eye detail, with the orange stripe just visible at the front edge.
attribute_graphic_design: Two vertical orange stripes on the front, stylized eye-like shapes, otherwise solid white and black color blocks.
